nodes.name: Cameroonian Highlands forests
nodes.summary: Cameroonian Highlands forests是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Green-breasted bushshrike、Yellow-breasted boubou、Mountain sooty boubou等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Cameroon mountain greenbul
nodes.summary: Cameroon mountain greenbul（Arizelocichla montana）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Cameroon mountain greenbul。

nodes.name: Cameroon mountain greenbul
nodes.summary: The Cameroon mountain greenbul (Arizelocichla montana) is a species of the bulbul family of passerine birds. It is found in the Cameroonian Highlands forests. It is suspected to become rarer due to habitat loss, largely from agriculture, although this is not enough to approach the thresholds for Vulnerable status. Taxonomy and systematics The Cameroon mountain greenbul was originally described in the genus Andropadus and, was re-classified to the new genus Arizelocichla in 2010. Alternatively, some authorities classify the Cameroon greenbul in the genus Pycnonotus. Alternate names for the Cameroon mountain greenbul include Cameroon little greenbul, Cameroon montane greenbul, montane greenbul and mountain little greenbul. The alternate names mountain bulbul and mountain greenbul should not be confused with the species of the same name (Ixos mcclellandii and Arizelocichla nigriceps respectively). References

nodes.name: 鸟纲
nodes.summary: 鸟纲（Aves）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10767种鸟类，如丹顶鹤、朱鹮、中华秋沙鸭等10767种鸟类。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: Arizelocichla
nodes.summary: Arizelocichla（Arizelocichla）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联9种鸟类，如Cameroon mountain greenbul、Shelley's greenbul、Uluguru mountain greenbul等9种鸟类。
